exact.verifyMatches: UniversalSettle destination for the signed transfer

sla-escrow.fundPaymentSeller: extra.merchantWallet or extra.beneficiary (seller payout wallet; not payTo)
sla-escrow.verifyMatches: payTo equals derive_escrow_pda(mint, bank) for payment asset

onboardNote: GET /onboard returns per-scheme previews. For sla-escrow, vaultPda is escrow for preview mint only; use discovery with each accepts.asset.

paymentMintAllowlist.upgradeWarning: POST /api/v1/facilitator/upgrade logs when accepts[].asset is not allowlisted (non-blocking)
